name: Local Light Shadows
author: automata-rtx
description: Real-geometry shadows cast by the game's local light sources (torch fires, bonfires, lanterns). The opaque world is re-rendered from the nearest active point light into a light-space depth map and composited over the scene, darkening surfaces the light cannot reach. First attempt: single nearest light, directional (ortho) approximation of the point light, modulated by distance attenuation and surface facing so the shadow only appears where the light actually falls.
